status: AUTHORITATIVE — CT DAS JobAps class specs + official P-3B pay plans (eff 2025-07-01)
administering_agency: Connecticut Department of Aging and Disability Services (ADS), Bureau of Disability Determination Services
salary_schedule_title: CT DAS P-3B EB/EH/EQ Pay Plans, effective 07/01/2025
bargaining_status: CT DAS pay-plan classification P-3B (the EB/EH/EQ plans are filed under P-3B). The P-3B unit contract is administered by CSEA SEIU Local 2001 (apparent representing union; union identity not deeply re-verified this session). Prior 'AFSCME Local 714 / P-2' note was incorrect.
step_basis: annual, step progression (CT publishes Annual/Bi-Weekly/Daily/Hourly per step; 10-11 steps depending on group). min = Step 1, max = top step.
salary_group_system: CT Salary Group (SG) system: the class number encodes the pay plan code (EB/EH/EQ) and the spec states the Salary Group number; the pay-plan PDF 'Group' column gives the dollar grid for that number.
notes: All four classes verified: (a) class title -> Salary Group from the official CT DAS JobAps class specifications, and (b) the dollar grid for that Salary Group from the official CT DAS P-3B pay-plan PDFs (eff 2025-07-01), extracted from the PDFs locally with pypdf. IMPORTANT: the Firecrawl markdown/PDF-table conversion dropped several middle groups and the page-query mode returned a hallucinated EQ-25 (it duplicated EQ-22), so dollar figures were taken from local pypdf text extraction of the downloaded PDFs, not the markdown scrape. Corrections to prior notes: administering agency is ADS Bureau of Disability Determination Services (not DSS); the examiner series is the Disability Claims Examiner Assistant / Examiner / Specialist / Supervisor series; the plan classification is P-3B (not P-2).

Disability Claims Examiner Assistant (35.basis: Authoritative — EB 21 grade from JobAps class spec 7102EB; dollars from the official P-3B EB 35-hour pay plan (local pypdf extraction).

Disability Claims Examiner (40 Hour).basis: Authoritative — EH 23 grade from JobAps class spec 7103EH; dollars from the official P-3B EH 40-hour pay plan (local pypdf extraction). This is the core DDS examiner class.

Disability Claims Specialist (40 Hour).basis: Authoritative — EQ 25 grade from JobAps class spec 7104EQ; dollars from the official P-3B EQ 40-hour pay plan Group 25 (local pypdf extraction). NOTE: the Firecrawl page-query falsely returned EQ-22 values for 'EQ 25'; the correct EQ-25 row above was read directly from the PDF text.

Disability Claims Supervisor (40 Hour).basis: Authoritative — EH 28 grade from JobAps class spec 7105EH; dollars from the official P-3B EH 40-hour pay plan Group 28 (local pypdf extraction; the EH** 28 row).
